subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to the Kingdom of God! Praise be to God! You have attained the attachment of heart and soul to the Most Exalted. You have been enraptured
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @unity; oneness of humanity, @blind imitation [taqlid], @East and West; communication between East and West
